CREATE TABLE WS.SYS_DAV_RES (id INT, name VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE WS.DBA.SYS_DAV_RES__ (id INT, description VARCHAR);
SELECT complete_table_name('SYS_DAV_RES', 1) AS FullyQualifiedName FROM (SELECT 1 AS dummy) AS t;
SELECT t.FullyQualifiedName FROM (SELECT complete_table_name('SYS_DAV_RES', 1) AS FullyQualifiedName) AS t;

SELECT t1.FullyQualifiedName FROM (SELECT complete_table_name('SYS_DAV_RES', 1) AS FullyQualifiedName) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT complete_table_name('SYS_DAV_RES__', 1) AS FullyQualifiedName) AS t2 ON t1.FullyQualifiedName <> t2.FullyQualifiedName;
